title: delphinium roylei
intro: Delphinium roylei, also known as Himalayan larkspur, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. The plant contains a variety of medicinal compounds, including alkaloids and glycosides, which are traditionally used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Delphinium roylei have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects, making it beneficial for treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Delphinium roylei can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction for its herbal remedies, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
